hero.name: Fran Sanmartín
hero.pitch: You have the vision. I'll handle the roadmap. From strategy to go-to-market to the engineering behind it, with the clarity your leadership expects and without the overhead of an agency.

meta.title: Fran Sanmartín — Strategy that ships
